name: CyberTech Systems and Software Limited
summary: CyberTech Systems and Software Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides information technology solutions to the government, education, utilities, public safety and homeland defense, technology, telecom, retail, healthcare, and manufacturing industries in India and the United States. The company offers GeoShield, a public safety solution; and GeoCivic. It also provides Spatialitics Health, a spatial analytics; and Spatialitics Utilities, a spatial analytics suite using SAP business suite or SAP S/4HANA. In addition, the company offers CyberSupport, an on demand IT support platform; and CyberServe, a healthcare analytics platform for population health. Further, it provides SAP S/4HANA, SAP cloud and analytics, SAP spatial enablement, digital supply chain, Spatial apps on SAP HANA, intelligent asset management, and geodata management services. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Thane, India.
